response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics matched the Reference JSON lyrics for both 'ANIMA' and 'Idol'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics for the song segments. Transcribed the middle talk/MC segment manually as it was not included in the JSON. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely synchronized with the vocal delivery. Timestamps utilize instantaneous transitions (Line 1 end = Line 2 start) during rapid speech to prevent delays, and are kept silent during the guitar solo instrumental section where there are no vocals.

subtitles.original: 伸びてく枝葉が分かれて それぞれの道を行く
subtitles.english: The growing branches separate and go their own ways...

subtitles.original: 寂しい思い出だけが 強く根を張ってる
subtitles.english: Only the lonely memories have taken deep root.

subtitles.original: また 貫いて 失って それでも挫けない
subtitles.english: I pierce and lose again, yet I do not give up.

subtitles.original: 心はどこに 器はどこに
subtitles.english: Where is the heart? Where is the vessel?

subtitles.original: ただ残されて抜け落ちて それでも伝えたいよ
subtitles.english: Just left behind and falling out, yet I still want to convey it...

subtitles.original: 魂の日々を 魂の意志を ずっと
subtitles.english: The days of the soul, the will of the soul, always...

subtitles.original: 魂の色は 何色ですか
subtitles.english: What color is the soul?

subtitles.original: 赤い色ですか
subtitles.english: Is it red?

subtitles.original: 青い色ですか
subtitles.english: Is it blue?

subtitles.original: 魂の色は
subtitles.english: The color of the soul is...

subtitles.original: 何色ですか
subtitles.english: What color is it?

subtitles.original: 透明な過去に 不透明な明日に
subtitles.english: In the transparent past, in the opaque tomorrow...

subtitles.original: 生きるあなたは 何色ですか
subtitles.english: What color are you who lives on?

subtitles.original: また 躓いて 転がって それでも砕けない
subtitles.english: I stumble and fall again, yet I don't shatter.

subtitles.original: 魂の色は 何色ですか
subtitles.english: What color is the soul?

subtitles.original: ただ 傷ついて 強がって それでも見つけたいよ
subtitles.english: Just getting hurt and acting tough, yet I still want to find it.

subtitles.original: 魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
subtitles.english: I am confirming the shape of the soul.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ 3曲連続でお届けしましたが、
subtitles.english: Yay! I delivered three songs in a row,

subtitles.original: みんな、楽しんでますかー？
subtitles.english: is everyone having fun?!

subtitles.original: 快適に見れてますかー？
subtitles.english: Are you able to watch comfortably?!

subtitles.original: えー、幽☆遊☆白書の「アンバランスなKISSをして」は、月をね、映してもらったり、
subtitles.english: We had the moon projected for Yu Yu Hakusho's 'Unbalanced Kiss,'

subtitles.original: 戦闘シーンをイメージして炎に囲まれていたり、
subtitles.english: being surrounded by fire to evoke a combat scene,

subtitles.original: ダンスの振りにもね、キャラクターの技が入っていたりしておりまして、
subtitles.english: and even in the dance choreography, the characters' moves were incorporated.

subtitles.original: 「GS美神 極楽大作戦!!」の「GHOST SWEEPER」にも、お札をね、持っている振りが、あったり、
subtitles.english: In 'GHOST SWEEPER' from GS Mikami, there was a move where I hold paper charms,

subtitles.original: あとは幽霊が飛んでいるそんな演出があったりしました！ 気付いたかな？
subtitles.english: and there was also an effect with flying ghosts! Did you notice?

subtitles.original: そして、ソードアート・オンラインの「ANIMA」は、いつか歌いたいと思っていた曲で、
subtitles.english: And Sword Art Online's 'ANIMA' is a song I've wanted to sing for a long time,

subtitles.original: 満を持しての披露だったんですが、いかがだったでしょうかー？
subtitles.english: so it was a highly anticipated performance, but how did you like it?!

subtitles.original: いや、かっこよかったなー！
subtitles.english: Man, that was so cool!

subtitles.original: すごいな、わためバキバキだな！うふふっ。
subtitles.english: Wow, Watame was totally shredding it! (laughs)

subtitles.original: では！ え、まだこれで終わりではありません！
subtitles.english: Now then! This is not the end yet!

subtitles.original: ここからは、鏡ゲートを使ったギミックや、
subtitles.english: From here on, we'll have gimmicks using the mirror gates,

subtitles.original: やってみたかった演出なども入ってくるので、
subtitles.english: as well as performances I've wanted to try,

subtitles.original: さらに盛り上がる、爆沸きステージをいっぱいやっていきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: so I want to show you lots of super exciting, high-energy stages!

subtitles.original: それでは！ 行ってきまーす！
subtitles.english: Well then, here I go!

subtitles.original: 無敵の笑顔で荒らすメディア
subtitles.english: An unrivaled smile, devastating the media

subtitles.original: 知りたいその秘密ミステリアス
subtitles.english: I want to know that secret, mysterious

subtitles.original: 抜けてるとこさえ彼女のエリア
subtitles.english: Even the parts she's missing are her area

subtitles.original: 完璧で嘘つきな君は
subtitles.english: You, perfect and a liar, are

subtitles.original: 天才的なアイドル様
subtitles.english: the ultimate, genius-like idol!

subtitles.original: 今日何食べた？
subtitles.english: What did you eat today?

subtitles.original: 好きな本は？
subtitles.english: What's your favorite book?

subtitles.original: 遊びに行くならどこに行くの？
subtitles.english: If you go out to play, where do you go?

subtitles.original: 何も食べてない
subtitles.english: I haven't eaten anything

subtitles.original: それは内緒
subtitles.english: That's a secret

subtitles.original: 何を聞かれてものらりくらり
subtitles.english: No matter what you ask, dodging it so easily

subtitles.original: そう淡々と だけど燦々と
subtitles.english: So nonchalantly, yet so brilliantly,

subtitles.original: 見えそうで見えない秘密は蜜の味
subtitles.english: the secret that seems visible but isn't, tastes like honey

subtitles.original: あれもないないない これもないないない
subtitles.english: There's none of that, none of this either

subtitles.original: 好きなタイプは？ 相手は？ さあ答えて
subtitles.english: What's your favorite type? Your partner? Come on, answer!

subtitles.original: 「誰かを好きになることなんて私わからなくてさ」
subtitles.english: "I don't really understand what it means to fall in love with someone."
